Think about it, close number one. Grant, I need to think about it. Sir, thought is instantaneous. I want you to think of an elephant. Did you get it? See, thought is immediate and instantaneous. It's not something that takes time. Think about the watch on my arm right now. How long did that take? It took that long. See, what I need you to do now is make a decision. Not think about it. It's yes or no now. It's do or don't do. Look, I'm fine with either one. Which one is it? Yes or no? If it's yes, I need you to sign right here.
